  • Method
Package com.github.query4j.core.impl

Class DynamicQueryBuilder<T>

java.lang.Object
com.github.query4j.core.impl.DynamicQueryBuilder<T>
Type Parameters:
T - Entity type
All Implemented Interfaces:
QueryBuilder<T>
public final class DynamicQueryBuilder<T> extends Object implements QueryBuilder<T>
Immutable, thread-safe implementation of QueryBuilder interface. Uses predicate-based query building with fluent API.
Since:
1.0.0

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    DynamicQueryBuilder(@NonNull Class<T> entityClass)

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    QueryBuilder<T>
    and()
    Adds an AND logical operator between conditions.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    avg(@NonNull String numericFieldName)
    Adds an AVG (average) aggregation function for numeric fields.
    DynamicQuery<T>
    build()
    Builds and returns a DynamicQuery instance without executing it.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    cached()
    Enables caching for this query with default settings.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    cached(long timeToLiveSeconds)
    Enables caching for this query with specified time-to-live.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    cached(String cacheRegionName)
    Enables caching for this query in the specified cache region.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    closeGroup()
    Closes the current group of conditions (equivalent to closing parentheses).
    long
    count()
    Executes a count query and returns the number of matching results.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    count(@NonNull String fieldName)
    Adds a COUNT(fieldName) aggregation function.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    countAll()
    Adds a COUNT(*) aggregation function.
    CompletableFuture<Long>
    countAsync()
    Executes a count query asynchronously.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    customFunction(@NonNull String functionName, @NonNull String fieldName, Object... parameters)
    Adds a custom database function call.
    boolean
    exists()
    Checks if any results exist for this query.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    exists(QueryBuilder<?> subquery)
    Adds an EXISTS subquery condition.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    fetch(@NonNull String associationFieldName)
    Adds a fetch join to eagerly load the specified association.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    fetchSize(int fetchSize)
    Sets the fetch size hint for result processing.
    List<T>
    findAll()
    Executes the query and returns all matching results.
    CompletableFuture<List<T>>
    findAllAsync()
    Executes the query asynchronously and returns all matching results.
    T
    findOne()
    Executes the query and returns the first result, or null if no results.
    CompletableFuture<T>
    findOneAsync()
    Executes the query asynchronously and returns the first result.
    Page<T>
    findPage()
    Executes the query and returns paginated results with metadata.
    QueryStats
    getExecutionStats()
    Returns query execution statistics and performance metrics.
    List<Predicate>
    getPredicates()
    Returns the immutable list of predicates in this builder.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    groupBy(@NonNull String... fieldNames)
    Adds GROUP BY clause with specified fields.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    having(@NonNull String aggregatedFieldName, @NonNull String operator, Object value)
    Adds a HAVING condition for aggregated results.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    hint(@NonNull String hintName, Object hintValue)
    Sets a query hint for performance tuning.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    in(@NonNull String fieldName, QueryBuilder<?> subquery)
    Adds an IN subquery condition.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    innerJoin(@NonNull String associationFieldName)
    Adds an INNER JOIN on the specified association field.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    join(@NonNull String associationFieldName)
    Adds an INNER JOIN on the specified association field.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    leftJoin(@NonNull String associationFieldName)
    Adds a LEFT JOIN on the specified association field.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    limit(int maxResults)
    Sets the maximum number of results to return.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    max(@NonNull String fieldName)
    Adds a MAX aggregation function to find maximum value.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    min(@NonNull String fieldName)
    Adds a MIN aggregation function to find minimum value.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    nativeQuery(@NonNull String sqlQuery)
    Executes a native SQL query instead of JPA criteria.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    not()
    Adds a NOT logical operator to negate the next condition.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    notExists(QueryBuilder<?> subquery)
    Adds a NOT EXISTS subquery condition.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    notIn(@NonNull String fieldName, QueryBuilder<?> subquery)
    Adds a NOT IN subquery condition.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    offset(int skipCount)
    Sets the number of results to skip.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    openGroup()
    Opens a new group of conditions (equivalent to opening parentheses).
    QueryBuilder<T>
    or()
    Adds an OR logical operator between conditions.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    orderBy(@NonNull String fieldName)
    Adds ascending ORDER BY for the specified field.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    orderBy(@NonNull String fieldName, boolean ascending)
    Adds ORDER BY with specified direction.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    orderByDescending(@NonNull String fieldName)
    Adds descending ORDER BY for the specified field.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    page(int pageNumber, int pageSize)
    Sets pagination using page number and page size.

    parameter(@NonNull String parameterName, Object parameterValue)
    Sets a named parameter for native queries.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    parameters(@NonNull Map<String,Object> parameterMap)
    Sets multiple named parameters for native queries.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    rightJoin(@NonNull String associationFieldName)
    Adds a RIGHT JOIN on the specified association field.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    select(@NonNull String... fieldNames)
    Specifies which fields to select in the query result.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    sum(@NonNull String numericFieldName)
    Adds a SUM aggregation function for numeric fields.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    timeout(int timeoutSeconds)
    Sets the query timeout in seconds.
    String
    toSQL()
    Generates the SQL representation of this query for debugging purposes.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    where(@NonNull String fieldName, @NonNull String operator, Object value)
    Adds a condition with a specific operator.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    where(@NonNull String fieldName, Object value)
    Adds an equality condition to the query.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    whereBetween(@NonNull String fieldName, Object startValue, Object endValue)
    Adds a BETWEEN range condition.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    whereIn(@NonNull String fieldName, @NonNull List<Object> values)
    Adds an IN condition for the specified field.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    whereIsNotNull(@NonNull String fieldName)
    Adds an IS NOT NULL condition.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    whereIsNull(@NonNull String fieldName)
    Adds an IS NULL condition.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    whereLike(@NonNull String fieldName, @NonNull String pattern)
    Adds a LIKE pattern matching condition.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    whereNotIn(@NonNull String fieldName, @NonNull List<Object> values)
    Adds a NOT IN condition for the specified field.
    QueryBuilder<T>
    whereNotLike(@NonNull String fieldName, @NonNull String pattern)
    Adds a NOT LIKE pattern matching condition.

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • DynamicQueryBuilder

      public DynamicQueryBuilder(@NonNull @NonNull Class<T> entityClass)

  • Method Details

    • getPredicates

      public List<Predicate> getPredicates()
      Returns the immutable list of predicates in this builder. Primarily for testing or advanced use cases.
      Returns:
      list of predicates

    • where

      public QueryBuilder<T> where(@NonNull @NonNull String fieldName, Object value)
      Description copied from interface: QueryBuilder
      Adds an equality condition to the query.
      Specified by:
      where in interface QueryBuilder<T>
      Parameters:
      fieldName - the field name, must not be null or empty
      value - the expected value, may be null
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance with the condition added

    • where

      public QueryBuilder<T> where(@NonNull @NonNull String fieldName, @NonNull @NonNull String operator, Object value)
      Description copied from interface: QueryBuilder
      Adds a condition with a specific operator.
      Specified by:
      where in interface QueryBuilder<T>
      Parameters:
      fieldName - the field name, must not be null or empty
      operator - the comparison operator (=, !=, <, <=, >, >=, LIKE), must not be null
      value - the comparison value, may be null for IS NULL/IS NOT NULL operators
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance with the condition added

    • whereIn

      public QueryBuilder<T> whereIn(@NonNull @NonNull String fieldName, @NonNull @NonNull List<Object> values)
      Description copied from interface: QueryBuilder
      Adds an IN condition for the specified field.
      Specified by:
      whereIn in interface QueryBuilder<T>
      Parameters:
      fieldName - the field name, must not be null or empty
      values - the list of possible values, must not be null or empty
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance with the condition added

    • whereNotIn

      public QueryBuilder<T> whereNotIn(@NonNull @NonNull String fieldName, @NonNull @NonNull List<Object> values)
      Description copied from interface: QueryBuilder
      Adds a NOT IN condition for the specified field.
      Specified by:
      whereNotIn in interface QueryBuilder<T>
      Parameters:
      fieldName - the field name, must not be null or empty
      values - the list of excluded values, must not be null or empty
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance with the condition added

    • whereLike

      public QueryBuilder<T> whereLike(@NonNull @NonNull String fieldName, @NonNull @NonNull String pattern)
      Description copied from interface: QueryBuilder
      Adds a LIKE pattern matching condition.
      Specified by:
      whereLike in interface QueryBuilder<T>
      Parameters:
      fieldName - the field name, must not be null or empty
      pattern - the pattern to match (supports % and _ wildcards), must not be null
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance with the condition added

    • whereNotLike

      public QueryBuilder<T> whereNotLike(@NonNull @NonNull String fieldName, @NonNull @NonNull String pattern)
      Description copied from interface: QueryBuilder
      Adds a NOT LIKE pattern matching condition.
      Specified by:
      whereNotLike in interface QueryBuilder<T>
      Parameters:
      fieldName - the field name, must not be null or empty
      pattern - the pattern to exclude, must not be null
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance with the condition added

    • whereBetween

      public QueryBuilder<T> whereBetween(@NonNull @NonNull String fieldName, Object startValue, Object endValue)
      Description copied from interface: QueryBuilder
      Adds a BETWEEN range condition.
      Specified by:
      whereBetween in interface QueryBuilder<T>
      Parameters:
      fieldName - the field name, must not be null or empty
      startValue - the start value (inclusive), must not be null
      endValue - the end value (inclusive), must not be null
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance with the condition added

      public QueryBuilder<T> whereIsNull(@NonNull @NonNull String fieldName)
      Description copied from interface: QueryBuilder
      Adds an IS NULL condition.
      Specified by:
      whereIsNull in interface QueryBuilder<T>
      Parameters:
      fieldName - the field name, must not be null or empty
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance with the condition added

      Description copied from interface: QueryBuilder

      Specified by:

      Parameters:

      Returns:

      public QueryBuilder<T> innerJoin(@NonNull @NonNull String associationFieldName)
      Description copied from interface: QueryBuilder
      Adds an INNER JOIN on the specified association field. This is an alias for QueryBuilder.join(String) for improved readability.

      Parameters:
      associationFieldName - the association field name, must not be null or empty
      Returns:

      Description copied from interface: QueryBuilder
      Adds ORDER BY with specified direction.
      Specified by:
      orderBy in interface QueryBuilder<T>
      Parameters:
      fieldName - the field name to sort by, must not be null or empty
      ascending - true for ASC, false for DESC
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance

      Description copied from interface: QueryBuilder
      Sets pagination using page number and page size.
      Specified by:

      Parameters:
      pageNumber - the page number (0-based), must not be negative
      pageSize - the page size, must be positive
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance

    • customFunction

      public QueryBuilder<T> customFunction(@NonNull @NonNull String functionName, @NonNull @NonNull String fieldName, Object... parameters)
      Description copied from interface: QueryBuilder
      Adds a custom database function call.
      Specified by:
      customFunction in interface QueryBuilder<T>
      Parameters:
      functionName - the name of the database function, must not be null or empty
      fieldName - the field to apply the function to, must not be null or empty
      parameters - additional function parameters, may be empty but not null
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance

      Description copied from interface: QueryBuilder
      Executes a native SQL query instead of JPA criteria.

      Parameters:

      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance

      Returns:

      public QueryBuilder<T> cached(String cacheRegionName)
      Description copied from interface: QueryBuilder
      Enables caching for this query in the specified cache region.
      Specified by:
      cached in interface QueryBuilder<T>
      Parameters:
      cacheRegionName - the cache region name, must not be null or empty
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance

    • cached

      public QueryBuilder<T> cached(long timeToLiveSeconds)
      Description copied from interface: QueryBuilder
      Enables caching for this query with specified time-to-live.
      Specified by:
      cached in interface QueryBuilder<T>
      Parameters:
      timeToLiveSeconds - the cache entry TTL in seconds, must not be negative
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance

      Description copied from interface: QueryBuilder

      Parameters:
      hintName - the hint name, must not be null or empty

      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance

      Parameters:
      fetchSize - the fetch size, must be positive
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance

      Parameters:
      timeoutSeconds - the timeout in seconds, must not be negative
      Returns:
      a new QueryBuilder instance

      public QueryStats getExecutionStats()
      Description copied from interface: QueryBuilder
      Returns query execution statistics and performance metrics.
      Specified by:
      getExecutionStats in interface QueryBuilder<T>
      Returns:
      QueryStats containing execution information, never null

    • count

      public long count()
      Description copied from interface: QueryBuilder
      Executes a count query and returns the number of matching results.
      Specified by:
      count in interface QueryBuilder<T>
      Returns:
      the count of matching entities, always non-negative

    • findAll

      public List<T> findAll()
      Description copied from interface: QueryBuilder
      Executes the query and returns all matching results.
      Specified by:
      findAll in interface QueryBuilder<T>
      Returns:
      list of matching entities, never null but may be empty

    • findOne

      public T findOne()
      Description copied from interface: QueryBuilder
      Executes the query and returns the first result, or null if no results.
      Specified by:
      findOne in interface QueryBuilder<T>
      Returns:
      the first matching entity or null if no results found

    • exists

      public boolean exists()
      Description copied from interface: QueryBuilder
      Checks if any results exist for this query.
      Specified by:
      exists in interface QueryBuilder<T>
      Returns:
      true if at least one result exists, false otherwise

    • findAllAsync

      public CompletableFuture<List<T>> findAllAsync()
      Description copied from interface: QueryBuilder
      Executes the query asynchronously and returns all matching results.
      Specified by:
      findAllAsync in interface QueryBuilder<T>
      Returns:
      CompletableFuture containing list of matching entities, never null

    • findOneAsync

      public CompletableFuture<T> findOneAsync()
      Description copied from interface: QueryBuilder
      Executes the query asynchronously and returns the first result.
      Specified by:
      findOneAsync in interface QueryBuilder<T>
      Returns:
      CompletableFuture containing the first matching entity or null

    • countAsync

      public CompletableFuture<Long> countAsync()
      Description copied from interface: QueryBuilder
      Executes a count query asynchronously.
      Specified by:
      countAsync in interface QueryBuilder<T>
      Returns:
      CompletableFuture containing the count of matching entities

    • findPage

      public Page<T> findPage()
      Description copied from interface: QueryBuilder
      Executes the query and returns paginated results with metadata.
      Specified by:
      findPage in interface QueryBuilder<T>
      Returns:
      a Page containing results and pagination information, never null

    • build

      public DynamicQuery<T> build()
      Description copied from interface: QueryBuilder
      Builds and returns a DynamicQuery instance without executing it. This allows for query reuse and performance optimization.
      Specified by:
      build in interface QueryBuilder<T>
      Returns:
      a DynamicQuery instance representing this builder's state, never null

    • toSQL

      public String toSQL()
      Description copied from interface: QueryBuilder
      Generates the SQL representation of this query for debugging purposes.
      Specified by:
      toSQL in interface QueryBuilder<T>
      Returns:
      the generated SQL string, never null but may be empty if not available
